title: Greek Comforting Boudin Blanc Bake
description: A hearty, comforting casserole inspired by Greek cuisine, featuring boudin blanc in a creamy sauce baked to perfection.

ingredients.name: Comforting Sauce (butter, flour, milk, feta cheese)

instructions: Cook the boudin blanc according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of flour, whisking to avoid lumps, and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually pour in 1 cup of milk, whisking continuously, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and stir in 1/2 cup of crumbled feta cheese until melted.
Add 1 teaspoon of Greek seasoning and mix well.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange half of the cooked boudin blanc.
Pour the comforting sauce over the boudin, followed by the remaining boudin blanc.
Sprinkle 1/2 cup of bread crumbs and 1/2 cup of grated Parmesan cheese on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional feta cheese if desired.
